name: coding-iris-plugin
description: Reusable coding rules and workflows for IRIS ObjectScript, CSP, JavaScript, and HISUI projects.
defaultPrompt: Initialize IRIS coding support in this project
Handle an IRIS coding request with the unified coding workflow
Modify this ObjectScript class using IRIS backend rules
Modify this CSP/HISUI page using IRIS frontend rules
Convert frontend files to GB2312 and promote them after confirmation
Prepare an IRIS deployment manifest and deploy after confirmation
Check this change against IRIS coding and deployment rules
